prompt: Studio product photograph of a heavy natural-canvas workshop apron with leather neck strap and crossback straps, hanging from a single iron hook on a worn weathered grey wooden pegboard wall. The apron has two large pockets at hip level and a chest pocket. The apron is COMPLETELY BLANK, UNBRANDED, with NO logos, NO patches, NO embroidery, NO print, NO graphics, NO text anywhere on the canvas — a plain unmarked mockup ready for custom branding application. Slight wrinkles and use-creases at the pocket seams suggest it has been worn, not pristine new. Soft window light from camera-left casts a subtle shadow along the right edge. High-contrast slightly desaturated palette. Working-contractor catalog feel, NOT lifestyle craft-fair, NOT pristine staged. No people.
